compliance.assurance_rationale: FDA 21 CFR Part 11 §11.10(e) Audit trails — schema change detection evidences the change-audit-trail requirement for validated databases.
NERC CIP-010-4 R1 Configuration change management — schema change detection contributes change-management evidence for BES-supporting databases.
SOX ITGC change-authorization control — financial-relevant schema change detection is a standard ITGC program-change authorization control tested by SOX auditors.
